meta.title: Cosmetics Store
meta.subtitle: Cosmetic-only trails, pets, hats, and chat tags. No gameplay advantages.

instructions: Pay securely on the payment page.
After payment, the Paper server automatically grants your cosmetic permission.

categories.label: Trails
categories.note: Particle effects that follow your movement.

categories.label: Pets
categories.note: Cosmetic companions that follow you around.

categories.label: Hats
categories.note: Wearable cosmetics with no gameplay advantage.

categories.label: Chat Tags
categories.note: Cosmetic labels for chat and profile styling.

products.name: Personal Sunshine
products.description: A warm golden dust trail that brightens the path behind you.
products.delivery: Unlocks the Personal Sunshine trail permission.

products.name: Coffee Wisps
products.description: Soft roasted wisps for players who are always freshly brewed.
products.delivery: Unlocks the Coffee Wisps trail permission.

products.name: Bubble World
products.description: A clear bubble trail for players living in their own little world.
products.delivery: Unlocks the Bubble World trail permission.

products.name: Soul Flame
products.description: A blue soul fire trail for the mysterious overthinker build.
products.delivery: Unlocks the Soul Flame trail permission.

products.name: Enchanted Glyphs
products.description: Glowing arcane particles that make every hallway feel forbidden.
products.delivery: Unlocks the Enchanted Glyphs trail permission.

products.name: Gerald
products.description: A chicken. Just Gerald. He has never been late to anything.

products.name: Business Cat
products.description: A cat in a tiny tie. Very serious. Very employed.
products.delivery: Unlocks the Business Cat pet permission.

products.name: Sad Crab
products.description: Slowly shuffles behind you. Doing his best.
products.delivery: Unlocks the Sad Crab pet permission.

products.name: Biscuit
products.description: A golden retriever puppy with aggressive enthusiasm.

products.name: Mochi
products.description: A tiny round cat. Basically a circle with opinions.

products.name: Sunny Side Up
products.description: A fried egg hat for players who wake up and choose breakfast.
products.delivery: Unlocks the Sunny Side Up hat permission.

products.name: The Fedora
products.description: You know what you did. At least now it is official.

products.name: [Certified Menace]
products.description: A chat tag for players who are technically helping.
products.delivery: Unlocks the [Certified Menace] chat tag permission.

products.name: [Doing My Best]
products.description: A chat tag for honest effort, questionable outcomes, and good vibes.
products.delivery: Unlocks the [Doing My Best] chat tag permission.
